LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. DEFENDANT KAREN SMITH'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. CLAIMANT HAS ESTABLISHED THAT SHE NEEDS ALL OF THE INCOME FOR HER SUPPORT. THE MONEY BEING HELD BY THE SHERIFF SHALL BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. COURT TO PREPARE AND SERVE THE ORDER. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER, CSR # 4761

calendar.matters:
Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Karen Smith, Tel. 415.671.0801, defendant/claimant appearing on her own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT KAREN SMITH'S Claim Of Exemption is granted. Claimant has established that she needs all of the income for her support. The money being held by the Sheriff shall be released to the judgment debtor. Court to prepare and serve the order. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Susan Crozier, CSR # 4761

Hrg On Claim Of Exemption; Oppos
Off Calendar May-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

Plaintiff CAPITAL ONE BANK (U.S.A.), N.A.'S Hearing on Claim of Exemption will be heard at 9:30 am on the Law and Motion calendar. Judge Pro Tem: Elizabeth Riles, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not reported. =(302/JPT)
